Petition For Determination Of Entitlement To Estate Distribution, And For Invalidation Of Disclaimer Of A.J. Konou
Off Calendar Sep-28-2011 Continued To Oct-12-11 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Collier for Stephen Wilson, Wendy Wilson, Peter Wilson and David Wilson. Pamela Smith for Antipas Konou.

The matter was continued to October 12, 2011 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204 to see if Counsel can come to an agreement with regard to stipulated facts and a proposed order on the heirship petition. If there is no objection to what is presented, the matter will deemed under submission on that date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.

Petition For Determination Of Entitlement To Estate Distribution, And For Invalidation Of Disclaimer Of A.J. Konou

Off Calendar Sep-12-2011 Continued To Dec-12-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Determination Of Entitlement To Estate Distribution, And For Invalidation Of Disclaimer Of A.J. Konou
Off Calendar Aug-31-2011 Continued To Sep-21-11 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Collier for Stephen Wilson, Wendy Wilson, David Wilson and Peter Wilson. Pamela Smith for Antipas J. Konou. Neil Price (Attorney In Fact for A. J. Konou).

The matter was presented and argued. The two matters of law were taken under submission. The trial dates of September 15, 2011 and September 22, 2011 are vacated. The Petition for Determination of Entitlement to Estate Distribution was continued to September 21, 2011 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of trial setting.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Chien.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Hearing On Two Matters Of Law
Off Calendar Sep-23-2011 Text Ruling

Petition For Determination Of Entitlement To Estate Distribution, And For Invalidation Of Disclaimer Of A.J. Konou
Off Calendar Jul-19-2011 Continued To Aug-31-11 At 02:30 P.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Collier for Steven Wilson, Wendy Wilson, Peter Wilson and David Wilson (Respondents). Pamela Smith for Antipas Konou. Niel Price Attorney In Fact for Antipas Konou also present.

Discussions were held with regard to the validity of the disclaimer, filing of a motion to bifurcate issues for trial, whether the marriage trumps the Pre-Registration Domestic Partnership Agreement, which issue to take up first and how to proceed. Counsel agreed that the motion to bifurcate issues will not be filed and that there are two matters of law for the Court decide. Said matters are as follows: 1) Does the marriage invalidate the domestic partnership agreement? And if not, 2) Does the domestic partnership agreement constitute a valid waiver of the pretermitted spousal claim? Simaltaneous briefs on said issues are due by August 26, 2011. Simaltaneous replies are due by September 2, 2011. Any exhibits proposed by Mr. Collier are to be provided to Ms. Smith by September 1, 2011. Counsel also agreed to a discovery cutoff date of August 29, 2011. The underline petition was continued to September 7, 2011 at 2:30 p.m., in Dept. 204 as well as the hearing on the two matters of law. Mr. Collier is to advise the Clerk and Ms. Smith in the event of a scheduling conflict so that dates can be adjusted timely. The September 15th and the Septmeber 22nd trial dates are maintained.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Off the record: The Clerk received a call from Mr. Collier on July 20, 2011 advising her that he would not be available on September 7, 2011. Therefore, the matter was continued to August 31, 2011 at 2:30 p.m., in Dept. 204. Initial briefs are due by August 19, 2011. Replies are due by August 26, 2011. The Clerk advised Ms. Smith of the date changes.

Petition For Determination Of Entitlement To Estate Distribution, And For Invalidation Of Disclaimer Of A.J. Konou
Off Calendar May-31-2011 Continued To Jul-19-11 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Collier for Stephen Wilson, Wendy Wiilson, Peter Wilson and David Wilson. Pamela Smith for A. J. Konou.

Ms. Smith stated that Mr. Konou was deported to the Marshall Islands and that he was available by telephone. Counsel agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than July 19, 2011. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by July 13, 2011. The Petition for Determination of Entitlement to Estate Distribution was continued to July 19, 2011 and the Parties are to return on July 19, 2011 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. Trial dates of September 15, 2011 at 1:30 p.m. and September 22, 2011 at 1:30 p.m. are reserved.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Determination Of Entitlement To Estate Distribution, And For Invalidation Of Disclaimer Of A.J. Konou
Off Calendar May-10-2011 Continued To May-31-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Feb-08-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Randolph Harris for Stephon Wilson.

Mr. Harris addressed the issues raised in the Examiner's notes with regard to status of the condominium, the car, the personal effects and the leasehold liens. The Court granted the status report (subject to review of the order). A further status hearing for a report of status or petition for final distribution will be set in 6 months (date to be indicated in the order).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
